title: Furnace Progress Tooltip
description: This is a simple Fabric mod, that adds a tooltip to the Recipe Book button of a Furnace or Blast Furnace GUI, showing the smelting progress numerically.
body:
**⚠️IMPORTANT⚠️**

This mod requires [Fabric API](https://modrinth.com/mod/fabric-api).

<hr>

**Mod Description**

**Furnace Progress Tooltip** is a client-sided Minecraft mod for the **Fabric Loader**, that adds a tooltip to the **Recipe Book** button, when being in a _Furnace GUI_, or a _Blast Furnace GUI_,  in-game. The tooltip contains the following information about the furnace:

1. **Smelting Progress** (as a percent).
2. **Inputted Item** (The item placed to be cooked/smelt).

For a visual of the mod, please check out this mod's screenshots in the **[Gallery Tab](https://modrinth.com/mod/furnace-progress-tooltip/gallery)**.

<hr>

**Donation**

If you like my work, and would like support me, then please consider to donate [here](https://paypal.com/paypalme/EdwardKhrabrov) (or with another link on the side bar, under "Links").
